full_text: Ali Khan to Pant, Bowled!! Knocked over! A superb delivery from Ali Khan, but aided significantly by the pitch. Keeps low and skids through off the pitch from a length, angled back in after pitching on middle stump. Goes under the bat as Pant tried to defend, and the stumps are a mess. USA are dreaming again!!
